title: 遭難！にゃんにゃんアイランド

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
A magnificent plan! I've secured exclusive access
to a cherry blossom island for our grand cherry
blossom viewing party!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Little did we know the boat would sail us straight
into disaster.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, an island full of cats beats cherry blossoms
anytime if you ask me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey, kitty kitty. Meow about a siesta with me? ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Is that a big ol' yes? I feel like I could stay here
for a long, long meow.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You can catch me over there.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Mhm. Cats and uninhabited islands... Makes for a
nice picture.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey! I can't take your pic if you get too close!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, fretting won't resolve anything. I think I'll
have a little nap myself.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Lucky for me, Sky and Taishin aren't paying me
much mind...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hnngh! This isn't the time... but you're sooo cute!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and you're so fluffy... There really is a heaven
on earth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few hours later, the rescue team arrives. The
three Umamusume are found fast asleep,
swaddled in a pile of cats.
